_comment: aish — Windows Terminal profile fragment (v1.0-1, #133). Paste this object into the 'profiles -> list' array of your Windows Terminal settings.json. Locate the file via Windows Terminal: Settings -> Open JSON file, or directly at %LocalAppData%\Packages\Microsoft.WindowsTerminal_*\LocalState\settings.json.
name: aish
_install_notes: 1. Open Windows Terminal -> Settings -> 'Open JSON file' (Ctrl+Shift+,)
2. Find the 'profiles' object, then its 'list' array
3. Append this object as a new list item (remove the leading '_comment' and '_install_notes' fields; they are documentation only)
4. Save the file; Windows Terminal hot-reloads
5. The 'aish' profile now appears in the new-tab dropdown
6. (Optional) Set as default by copying this object's 'guid' into the top-level 'defaultProfile' field
